/usr/bin/c++   -fopenmp -pthread -pg -g   -pg CMakeFiles/Waterpixels.dir/Waterpixels_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Waterpixels.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Waterpixels.dir/src/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Waterpixels.dir/src/clprogram.cpp.o  -o Waterpixels  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64 /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libOpenCL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.12.8
